arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network manager device.

aws_location.description: The AWS location details, including subnet ARN and availability zone, of the device.

description.description: A user-defined description of the network manager device.

id.description: The unique identifier for the network manager device.

location.description: The geographical location of the device, including address, latitude, and longitude.

model.description: The model of the network manager device.

serial_number.description: The serial number of the network manager device.

site_id.description: The site identifier where the network manager device is located.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs assigned to the network manager device for organization and categorization.

vendor.description: The vendor or manufacturer of the network manager device.
